category_sources: Official Grafana Loki docs describe it as open source components for a logging stack.
source_facts.description says Loki is a horizontally-scalable, highly-available log aggregation system.
display_name_sources: Official documentation page title is Grafana Loki.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/grafana/loki; per instruction, repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official Grafana docs describe Loki logging stack, labels, storage, and LogQL.
source_facts.description identifies log aggregation and high availability.
